case_title: COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC VS. ED PUCCIO et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC AS TO DEFENDANT PUCCIO, ED CAMPOS, HUGO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-19-2011

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOS, HUGO $4,912.05 PRINCIPAL, $825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,125.30 INTEREST, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,112.35, SEE SCANNED DOC
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC SERVED OCT-31-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, HUGO
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC AS TO DEFENDANT PUCCIO, ED CAMPOS, HUGO
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT PUCCIO, ED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $880.76 INTEREST, $42.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-08-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-08-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) ED PUCCIO. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
